pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven properties to target Java 21 instead of Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 11 semantics, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features and compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling code for Java 21 or may lack necessary bug fixes for newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from separate source/target to the unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using separate source/target is deprecated in newer JDKs and does not correctly configure the bootstrap classpath for the target JDK, leading to potential runtime issues with module system or API availability.
